name: Neural Nomad #18: Gold — Sovereign
description: Ten pieces in, and the fragments start to recognize each other. What was scattered begins to speak the same language — not the old one, but something that fits better now. The sovereign doesn't rule; it simply knows what belongs.
threshold_note: Between the person you were breaking and the person you're becoming whole.
collector_meaning: You hold the moment when all the broken things discover they were never meant to go back together the same way. This is what sovereignty actually costs.
